infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ChiGo uses your location to narrow dish results to your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ChiGo uses your camera so you can capture menu photos for dish recognition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ChiGo uses your photo library so you can choose menu photos for dish recognition.
